warnings.dieu_kien: ABS(TO_NUMBER(XML1.T_BHTT) - (SUM_IF(XML2, item => !IS_EMPTY(item.T_BHTT), item => TO_NUMBER(item.T_BHTT)) + SUM_IF(XML3, item => !IS_EMPTY(item.T_BHTT), item => TO_NUMBER(item.T_BHTT)))) > 1
